source_note: CPUC Decision D.05-11-007 (adopted November 18, 2005), Application A.05-02-014 — the Energy Resource Recovery Account (ERRA) reasonableness review for Pacific Gas and Electric Company, finding PG&E's power-purchase-agreement administration and least-cost-dispatch procurement for Jan 1–Dec 31, 2004 'reasonable and prudent' ($74.9M undercollection). ERRA is California's annual fuel & purchased-power prudence determination. Listed for reference (metadata-only); the decision is published as HTML on the CPUC document portal, so it is captured by reference rather than machine-fetched. Source: CPUC (docs.cpuc.ca.gov/published/Final_decision/51417.htm).

CPUC Decision D.06-01-007 — the Energy Resource Recovery Account (ERRA) reasonableness/prudence review for Southern California Edison Company; the Commission rejected the Division of Ratepayer Advocates' recommended $16.36M disallowance for hour-ahead-market transactions, finding SCE's least-cost-dispatch process reasonable. ERRA is California's annual fuel & purchased-power prudence determination. Adopted January 2006 (the CPUC decision number D.YY-MM-NNN encodes the adoption year+month); `issued_date` is left null because the exact adoption day is not carried in the CPUC HTML decision and is not inferred. Listed for reference (metadata-only; published as HTML on the CPUC document portal). Source: CPUC (docs.cpuc.ca.gov/published/Final_decision/52767-03.htm).

CPUC Decision D.03-12-063, Application A.02-12-028 — the Energy Resource Recovery Account (ERRA) reasonableness review for San Diego Gas & Electric Company's fuel and purchased-power costs. ERRA is California's annual fuel & purchased-power prudence determination. Adopted December 2003 (the CPUC decision number D.YY-MM-NNN encodes the adoption year+month); `issued_date` is left null because the exact adoption day is not carried in the CPUC HTML decision and is not inferred. Listed for reference (metadata-only; published as HTML on the CPUC document portal). Source: CPUC (docs.cpuc.ca.gov/published/Final_decision/32806-01.htm).
